## Type

- [ ] New skill
- [ ] New slash command
- [ ] New subagent
- [ ] Skill improvement
- [ ] Docs / community files
- [ ] Bugfix

## Checklist

- [ ] Frontmatter `name` matches filename / directory
- [ ] `description` clearly states activation triggers (skills) or what it does (commands/agents)
- [ ] Code samples are valid Moodle (PHP parses, references real APIs)
- [ ] Links use `moodledev.io` where applicable
- [ ] Moodle version notes added where APIs differ across versions
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated
- [ ] `plugin.json` + `marketplace.json` versions bumped (user-facing changes only)
